items.name_en: M25318 Red Chip. This OnTheGo East West bag features a Monogram Tiles canvas in a slender silhouette, adding a striking look to the By The Pool collection. A pastel Circle logo and Monogram flowers pay homage to a dreamy coastline. The detachable wide strap offers flexible carrying. Dimensions: 25*13*10cm

items.name_en: M25359 Beige M24639 Black M24640 Brown Chip
items.name_cn:
M25359 Beige M24639 Black M24640 Brown Chip
This Soft Twist bag is crafted from soft calfskin, reinterpreting the iconic Twist bag in a generous size. Weathered metal hardware shines with a striking look, while the design and multiple carrying ways ensure a comfortable travel experience. Dimensions: 27*19*9cm.

items.name_en: M11303 Pink M11672 Yellow Chip
items.name_cn:
M11303 Pink M11672 Yellow Chip
The Bloom Pouch handbag combines classic Monogram canvas with delicate leather on the sides, interpreting the inspiration of Monogram flowers with a gentle design. The compact structure can hold daily essentials like a short wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick, and features a removable chain for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 22.5*13*13cm.
